wards_bengaluru_gba.label: Greater Bengaluru Wards (2025)
wards_bengaluru_gba.description: Greater Bengaluru Authority — 369 final wards across 5 corporations, notified Nov 2025.
wards_bengaluru_gba.notes: Latest GBA delimitation. Pair with the 5-corp polygons for parent grouping.
wards_bengaluru_gba.seo_description: Map of all 369 Greater Bengaluru wards (GBA, notified Nov 2025) across 5 corporations. View ward boundaries and names; download as GeoJSON, KML or Parquet.

corporation_bengaluru.label: Greater Bengaluru Corporations (2025)
corporation_bengaluru.description: Five corporation-level polygons that make up the Greater Bengaluru Authority.
corporation_bengaluru.notes: Parent polygons for the 369 GBA wards.

wards_bengaluru_bbmp_2022.label: BBMP Wards (2022, historical)
wards_bengaluru_bbmp_2022.description: Bruhat Bengaluru Mahanagara Palike — 243 wards from the 2022 draft delimitation. Historical reference; superseded by the 2025 GBA 369-ward scheme.
wards_bengaluru_bbmp_2022.notes: Use the GBA 2025 layer for current ward boundaries.
wards_bengaluru_bbmp_2022.seo_description: Map of 243 BBMP wards from Bengaluru's 2022 draft delimitation (historical, superseded by the 2025 GBA scheme). View ward boundaries and names; download as GeoJSON or KML.

bda_jurisdiction.label: BDA Jurisdiction
bda_jurisdiction.description: Bengaluru Development Authority planning + acquisition jurisdiction boundary.
bda_jurisdiction.notes: Single polygon. Useful as a boundary mask for any BDA-scoped analysis.

bda_layouts.label: BDA Approved Layouts
bda_layouts.description: BDA-approved residential and commercial layout boundaries within the BDA jurisdiction.

wards_chennai.label: Chennai (GCC) Wards
wards_chennai.description: Greater Chennai Corporation — 200 ward boundaries across the 15 zones.
wards_chennai.seo_description: Interactive map of all 200 wards in Chennai (GCC). View ward boundaries and numbers, filter by ward, and download as GeoJSON, KML or Parquet.

wards_hyderabad.label: Hyderabad (GHMC) Wards
wards_hyderabad.description: Greater Hyderabad Municipal Corporation — 145 wards across 6 zones.
wards_hyderabad.seo_description: Interactive map of all 145 wards in Hyderabad (GHMC). View ward boundaries and names, filter by ward, and download as GeoJSON, KML or Parquet.

wards_mumbai.label: Mumbai (BMC) Wards
wards_mumbai.description: Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation — 24 administrative wards (A–T plus the city-island spread).
wards_mumbai.seo_description: Interactive map of all 24 wards in Mumbai (BMC). View ward boundaries and numbers, filter by ward, and download as GeoJSON, KML or Parquet.

electoral_wards_mumbai_2017.label: Mumbai Electoral Wards (2017)
electoral_wards_mumbai_2017.description: 227 electoral ward divisions of Mumbai, 2017 delimitation. Use for election + civic-rep maps.
electoral_wards_mumbai_2017.seo_description: Map of all 227 Mumbai electoral wards (2017 delimitation) for election and civic-rep mapping. View boundaries and download as GeoJSON, KML or Parquet.

wards_kolkata.label: Kolkata (KMC) Wards
wards_kolkata.description: Kolkata Municipal Corporation — 141 ward boundaries across the 16 boroughs.
wards_kolkata.seo_description: Interactive map of all 141 wards in Kolkata (KMC). View ward boundaries and numbers, filter by ward, and download as GeoJSON, KML or Parquet.

wards_kochi.seo_description: Interactive map of all 74 wards in Kochi (KMC). View ward boundaries and names, filter by ward, and download as GeoJSON, KML or Parquet.

vedas_power_plants.label: Power plants (VEDAS 2023)
vedas_power_plants.description: Thermal, hydro, nuclear and renewable power plant points across India, including installed capacity.

vedas_oil_refineries.label: Oil refineries (VEDAS)
vedas_oil_refineries.description: Oil refinery point locations across India.

vedas_oil_wells.label: Oil wells (VEDAS)
vedas_oil_wells.description: Oil well point locations across India.

vedas_wind_farms.label: Wind farms (VEDAS)
vedas_wind_farms.description: Wind farm point locations across India.

vedas_ethanol_plants.label: Ethanol plants (VEDAS)
vedas_ethanol_plants.description: Ethanol production plant locations across India.

vedas_solar_plants.label: Solar power plants (VEDAS)
vedas_solar_plants.description: Solar power plant point locations across India.

vedas_solar_panel_areas.label: Solar panel areas (VEDAS)
vedas_solar_panel_areas.description: Solar panel array polygon boundaries across India.

vedas_solar_panels_ai_2023.label: Solar panels — AI-detected (VEDAS 2023)
vedas_solar_panels_ai_2023.description: AI-derived solar panel footprints across India from VEDAS, 2023 snapshot. Complements the manually curated solar plants layer.

vedas_transmission_lines.label: Power transmission lines (VEDAS)
vedas_transmission_lines.description: High-voltage transmission line geometry across India. Licence differs from the rest of the VEDAS family — ODbL because the source is OSM-derived.

pmgsy_habitations.label: Rural habitations (PMGSY 2024)
pmgsy_habitations.description: Point locations of rural habitations registered under PMGSY. Finer than village polygons; finer than the LGD village hierarchy.

wris_lakes.label: Lakes (WRIS 2024)
wris_lakes.description: Lake polygons across India from the Central Water Commission Water Resources Information System.

wris_watersheds.label: Watersheds (WRIS 2024)
wris_watersheds.description: Watershed boundary polygons from CWC WRIS — the tier below sub-basin in the hydrology hierarchy.

wris_river_polygons.label: River polygons (WRIS 2024)
wris_river_polygons.description: Rivers as polygon geometry from CWC WRIS — complements the existing line-geometry river network for area-based queries.

slusi_soil_health.label: Soil health (SLUSI 2020-23 snapshot)
slusi_soil_health.description: Soil health cards / soil-suitability polygons across India from SLUSI. Vintage snapshot; the upstream refresh cadence is multi-year.

wris_waterbodies.label: Waterbodies (WRIS 2024)
wris_waterbodies.description: Surface waterbody polygons from CWC WRIS — covers ponds, tanks, reservoirs and natural waterbodies beyond named lakes.

slusi_micro_watersheds.label: Micro-watersheds (SLUSI)
slusi_micro_watersheds.description: Micro-watershed boundary polygons across India from the Soil and Land Use Survey of India — the finest watershed delineation in the hydrology hierarchy.

pmgsy_roads.label: Rural roads (PMGSY 2024)
pmgsy_roads.description: Pan-India rural road network built or in progress under PMGSY-I/II/III. Complements national highways.

ndem_floods_1998_2022.label: Flood inundation 1998-2022 (NDEM)
ndem_floods_1998_2022.description: Pan-India satellite-derived flood inundation polygons from 1998 to 2022, compiled by NDEM (NRSC/ISRO). Complements the older India Flood Inventory v3 event catalogue.

gsi_landslide_inventory.label: Landslide inventory (GSI)
gsi_landslide_inventory.description: Geological Survey of India landslide inventory — pan-India catalogue of historical landslide occurrences with metadata.

ndem_landslide_hazard.label: Landslide hazard zones (NDEM)
ndem_landslide_hazard.description: Landslide hazard zonation polygons across India from NDEM, classifying terrain by landslide susceptibility.

ngdr_earthquakes.label: Earthquake epicentres (NGDR)
ngdr_earthquakes.description: Historical earthquake epicentre points across India from the National Geoscience Data Repository (GSI Bhukosh). Complements the BIS IS 1893:2016 seismic hazard zones we already host.

ndem_cyclone_tracks.label: Cyclone tracks (NDEM)
ndem_cyclone_tracks.description: Historical cyclone track line geometries across the Indian Ocean basins, compiled by NDEM.

overture_places_india.label: Places — Overture Maps (Dec 2023)
overture_places_india.description: Pan-India points of interest from the Overture Maps Foundation December 2023 release. Names, categories, addresses, websites and confidence scores for restaurants, shops, ATMs, schools, transit, monuments and more.

cgwb_aquifers.label: Aquifers (CGWB)
cgwb_aquifers.description: Principal aquifer systems of India from the Central Ground Water Board, classified by rock type, age, yield and depth to water.

cgwb_gw_extraction.label: Groundwater Extraction (CGWB)
cgwb_gw_extraction.description: Block and taluk-level stage of groundwater extraction from the Central Ground Water Board: Safe, Semi-Critical, Critical and Over-Exploited units with recharge and draft figures.

wris_canals.label: Canals (WRIS)
wris_canals.description: Irrigation canal network across India from the Central Water Commission Water Resources Information System, with command area, project and canal-type attributes.

agro_ecological_zones.label: Agro-Ecological Zones
agro_ecological_zones.description: India's 20 agro-ecological regions classified by ICAR-NBSS&LUP from physiography, soils, bioclimate and length of growing period.

agro_climatic_zones.label: Agro-Climatic Zones
agro_climatic_zones.description: India's 15 agro-climatic zones defined by the Planning Commission for agricultural planning, with temperature, rainfall, soil and major-crop attributes.

biogeographic_zones.label: Biogeographic Zones
biogeographic_zones.description: India's biogeographic classification (10 zones across 26 provinces) from the Wildlife Institute of India: Himalaya, Western Ghats, Deccan Peninsula, Desert, Gangetic Plain and more.

layers.notes: Authoritative state and Union Territory boundaries from India's Local Government Directory (LGD). 36 polygons with the full LGD code chain, enabling joins with district, subdistrict, block and village layers.
Survey of India derivative.
NRSC/ISRO Bhuvan. Own codes, not LGD.

Every district in India from the Local Government Directory (LGD). 785 polygons; joins to state boundaries via the state_lgd code, with the full LGD chain for joining to subdistricts, blocks and villages.
SoI derivative. Partial LGD codes.
Bhuvan. Under-counts vs LGD in some states.

All subdistricts (tehsil / taluk / mandal) in India from the Local Government Directory (LGD). 6,471 polygons with the full LGD code chain for joining to districts, states, and finer admin levels (blocks, villages).
SoI tehsils. Partial codes.
Community-development blocks across India from the Local Government Directory (LGD). 7,146 polygons with the full LGD code chain joining to subdistricts, districts and states.
Bhuvan. Predates recent re-divisions in several states.
PMGSY rural roads blocks. Block + district + state names joined from PMGSY_Masterdata (99% coverage).
Authoritative. 319k gram-panchayat polygons. Use vector tiles to render at zoom.
Authoritative. 584k polygons. Use vector tiles to render.

SoI village centroids (point geometry). 5.76 lakh point features. Coverage is dense in southern + western states and sparse in UP, Bihar, Jharkhand and several NE states (SoI source limitation, not a rendering issue).
Lok Sabha constituencies — 543 polygons covering the entire country. Latest delimitation.
State legislative assembly constituencies. Polygons keyed by ST_CODE.

India Post delivery post office pincode boundaries from data.gov.in (May 2025). 19,312 polygons covering delivery PO service areas. Compare with bharatviz's 63,864 finer polygons. Neither is officially surveyed; both are Voronoi approximations from post office point locations.

India Post pincode boundary polygons (simplified). 63,864 polygons. © 2025 Saket Choudhary, MIT-licensed via bharatviz.org. Source: bharatviz.org/India_pincodes_simplified.geojson; code repo github.com/saketlab/bharatviz.
Wildlife sanctuaries + national parks. Source via PM GatiShakti GIS portal.
Eco-sensitive zone boundaries from MoEFCC Parivesh. Sourced via Bharatmaps.
Forest boundary polygons from Survey of India topographic maps. Includes reserved + protected + unclassed forests.
India's Ramsar Convention wetland sites of international importance, sourced via Bharatmaps Parivesh.
All wetland boundary polygons notified under MoEFCC Wetland Rules 2017. Sourced via Bharatmaps Parivesh.
India's major river basin polygons from the Central Water Commission Water Resources Information System (WRIS).
River sub-basin polygons (one tier under basins) from CWC WRIS.
India's river network from CWC WRIS — line geometry for streams and rivers.
BIS IS 1893:2016 seismic risk zones II-V. 173 polygons covering all of India. Use for earthquake hazard mapping.
Dam point locations across India from Bharatmaps.
Dam point locations from CWC WRIS. Compare with Bharatmaps dams for cross-source coverage.
Reservoir polygons from CWC WRIS. Complements the river basin and river network layers.
National highway centerlines from Ministry of Road Transport and Highways via PM GatiShakti. 10,317 line segments.
Primary Health Centres, Community Health Centres, sub-centres, and district hospitals from NIC HealthGIS. 147,957 point features across India.
Greater Bengaluru Authority — 369 final wards across 5 corporations, notified Nov 2025.
Five corporation-level polygons that make up the Greater Bengaluru Authority.
Bruhat Bengaluru Mahanagara Palike — 243 wards from the 2022 draft delimitation. Historical reference; superseded by the 2025 GBA 369-ward scheme.
Bengaluru Development Authority planning + acquisition jurisdiction boundary.
BDA-approved residential and commercial layout boundaries within the BDA jurisdiction.

India's national boundary as a single MultiPolygon, derived by dissolving the 36 LGD state + UT polygons. India-correct by construction (LGD is India's authoritative admin source — includes Aksai Chin via J&K/Ladakh and the full Arunachal Pradesh claim).
1,006 historical flood event polygons across India, 1960s-2020. Compiled for hydrological modelling research; useful as a climate-adaptation reference layer.

name-only
mislabeled in upstream — block-equivalent, not village
India's 25 High Court territorial jurisdictions. Dissolved from LGD states. Filter by seat city or search by state.
National Green Tribunal's 5 zonal bench jurisdictions (2017 gazette notification). Dissolved from LGD states.
National Company Law Tribunal's 15 bench jurisdictions. Dissolved from LGD states per nclt.gov.in.
Airports across India. 151 point features with name, type, district, state. From data.gov.in.
